responses: Hello! Welcome to the AI Student Support Center. How can I assist you today?
Hi there! I'm your virtual campus assistant. Ask me anything about admissions, exams, timings, or campus facilities!
Good day! How can I help you with your college-related questions today?
Hey! Welcome! Feel free to ask about fees, library timings, hostel rules, or anything else you need.

Take care! Have a productive week ahead.

patterns: What are the college timings?
When does the college open?
At what time do classes start?
When does college close?
What are the working hours of the institute?
Campus operating hours
Is the college open on weekends?
Tell me the college schedule
What time does campus open?
Working timings of the college
College hours today
responses: The academic campus is open Monday to Saturday from 8:30 AM to 5:30 PM. Administrative offices operate from 9:00 AM to 5:00 PM.
Regular lecture timings are from 9:00 AM to 4:30 PM (Monday through Friday), and 9:00 AM to 1:00 PM on Saturdays.
Our college operating hours are 8:30 AM - 5:30 PM on weekdays. The campus remains closed for regular classes on Sundays and public holidays.

patterns: When are the semester exams starting?
Tell me the exam schedule
Where can I find the date sheet?
Midterm exam timetable
When is the final examination schedule coming?
Exam dates for B.Tech
When do end semester exams begin?
Give me the exam timetable
What are the dates for mid-semester exams?
Is the date sheet released yet?
Practical examination dates
responses: Mid-semester examinations usually commence in the second week of October (Odd Semester) and mid-March (Even Semester). End-semester final exams start in December and May.
The official date sheet is released 3 weeks prior to the examinations on the student portal under the 'Examinations' tab.
For exact exam dates and practical schedules, please check your student dashboard or download the academic calendar from the controller of examinations notice board.

patterns: What is the admission process for B.Tech?
How can I apply for admission?
What are the eligibility criteria for engineering?
Entrance exam required for admission
Do you accept JEE Main scores?
What documents are required during admission?
Admission procedure details
Can I get direct admission?
How to enroll in computer science?
What is the cutoff rank for CSE admission?
Last date to submit admission form
responses: Admissions to B.Tech programs are conducted through JEE Main ranking counseling and state entrance examinations, followed by personal verification.
Eligibility: Minimum 60% aggregate in 10+2 with Physics, Mathematics, and Chemistry/Computer Science, plus a valid rank in national/state engineering entrance exams.
To apply, visit our online admissions portal at admissions.campus.edu, fill out the application form, upload your 10+2 mark sheets and JEE scorecard, and pay the registration fee.

patterns: What is the fee structure for B.Tech?
How much is the semester fee?
Tuition fee details
What is the total fee per year?
How and where do I pay my college fees?
Can I pay semester fees in installments?
Is there any examination fee extra?
Tell me the hostel and tuition fee breakdown
Last date to pay semester fee
Fee receipt download process
Online fee payment link
responses: The tuition fee for B.Tech programs is approximately ₹1,25,000 per academic year (payable in two semester installments of ₹62,500 each).
Fees can be paid online via Net Banking, UPI, or Debit/Credit Cards through the ERP Student Portal under 'Accounts -> Fee Payment'.
Additional fees include an annual examination fee of ₹3,000 and a one-time refundable security deposit of ₹10,000 at the time of admission.

patterns: Are there any scholarships available?
How can I apply for merit scholarship?
Do you offer financial aid or fee waivers?
Government scholarship schemes accepted here
What are the eligibility criteria for scholarship?
Is there any sports quota scholarship?
Scholarship for economically weaker sections EWS
Last date to apply for scholarship
Merit based fee discount details
Can I get a scholarship for high CGPA?
responses: We offer Merit Scholarships up to 100% tuition fee waiver for students with top 5000 JEE Main ranks or above 95% in 10+2 board examinations.
Students maintaining a CGPA of 9.0 and above across academic years are eligible for our Academic Excellence Scholarship (25% to 50% tuition waiver).
The institute also facilitates state and central government scholarship schemes including NSP, Post-Matric, and EWS financial aid. Visit Room 104 (Scholarship Cell) for assistance.

patterns: When is the assignment submission deadline?
How do I submit my lab assignments?
Where should I upload the project reports?
What is the penalty for late submission of assignments?
Can I get an extension for assignment deadline?
Assignment due date for current semester
Who checks the sessional assignments?
Are assignments counted in internal marks?
Online submission portal for assignments
responses: Assignment deadlines are announced by course instructors on the Learning Management System (LMS). Typically, assignments are due within 7 days of posting.
Late submissions incur a 10% mark deduction per day up to 3 days, after which submissions require special approval from the faculty advisor.
Please ensure all digital assignments are uploaded in PDF format to the LMS portal before 11:59 PM on the respective due date.

patterns: What are the library timings?
When does the central library open and close?
Is the library open on Sundays or late night?
How many books can I issue at once?
What is the fine for returning library books late?
How to access digital library and e-journals?
Where is the reading room located?
Can I bring my own laptop to the library?
Library membership card procedure
Online book reservation in library
responses: The Central Library operates from 8:00 AM to 10:00 PM on weekdays, and 9:00 AM to 6:00 PM on weekends.
During examination weeks, the 24/7 Reading Room on the ground floor remains open round the clock.
B.Tech students can issue up to 5 books at a time for a duration of 14 days. Late returns incur a fine of ₹5 per book per day. Digital journals (IEEE, ACM, Springer) are accessible via campus Wi-Fi.

patterns: How can I contact my professors?
Where is the HOD office located?
Give me the email directory of faculty members
Faculty visiting hours for doubt clearing
How to book an appointment with the dean?
Computer Science HOD contact number
Who is the first year faculty advisor?
Professor office locations
How to contact academic counselor?
responses: Faculty office hours for student consultation are generally scheduled between 3:00 PM and 4:30 PM on weekdays.
You can find the comprehensive faculty directory with official email addresses and cabin numbers on our website under the 'Academics -> Faculty Directory' section.
To meet the HOD or Dean, please contact the respective department administrative assistant or drop an official email to schedule a prior appointment.

patterns: What are the hostel facilities available?
How much is the annual hostel fee?
Are AC rooms available in the hostel?
What is the hostel curfew timing at night?
How is the food quality in the hostel mess?
Can I change my hostel room or roommate?
Is laundry service provided in the hostel?
How to apply for hostel accommodation?
Rules and regulations of boys and girls hostel
Wi-Fi facility inside hostel rooms
responses: We have separate, fully-secured hostels for boys and girls with options for single, double, and triple occupancy (AC and Non-AC variants).
The annual hostel fee (including mess charges, Wi-Fi, and laundry) is ₹85,000 for Non-AC and ₹1,15,000 for AC accommodation.
Hostel curfew timings are 9:30 PM for regular days and 10:30 PM on weekends. Every hostel block has 24/7 high-speed Wi-Fi, indoor games, gym, and hygienic mess facilities.

patterns: Tell me about campus placements
What is the highest package offered this year?
What is the average placement salary for CSE?
Which top companies visit for recruitment?
When do campus placements start for final year?
Does the college provide internship assistance?
Placement eligibility and cutoff CGPA
Training and placement cell contact details
How to register for placement drives?
Placement statistics and placement rate
responses: Our Training & Placement Cell maintains a stellar 92%+ placement record for engineering graduates.
For the recent batch, the Highest Package was ₹44 LPA (offered by a top tech giant) and the Average Package across B.Tech branches was ₹8.5 LPA.
Top recruiters include Microsoft, Google, Amazon, TCS, Infosys, Wipro, Accenture, and Deloitte. Pre-placement training (aptitude, coding, mock interviews) begins from the 6th semester.

patterns: What is the minimum attendance requirement?
Is 75% attendance compulsory?
What happens if my attendance is low?
How to apply for medical leave for attendance?
Can I sit for exams with 70% attendance?
Where can I check my current attendance percentage?
Rules for attendance condonation
Does participation in sports give attendance waiver?
How many classes can I skip per subject?
responses: As per university norms, a minimum of 75% attendance in every theory and laboratory subject is mandatory to appear for end-semester examinations.

Students with attendance between 65% and 74% due to genuine medical reasons or official university sports/co-curricular participation can apply for condonation by submitting medical certificates to the HOD.
You can check your real-time subject-wise attendance tracking anytime on the ERP Student Portal under 'Academics -> My Attendance'.

patterns: Tell me the upcoming holidays
When is the winter break starting?
How long are summer vacations?
Is tomorrow a holiday?
Provide the annual holiday calendar
Diwali and Holi vacation dates
When do semester breaks start?
List of official gazetted holidays for the institute
Is Saturday a holiday?
responses: The official academic holiday calendar is published at the beginning of each semester. Major vacations include Summer Break (June to mid-July) and Winter Break (late December to early January).
All national gazetted holidays (Republic Day, Independence Day, Gandhi Jayanti) and major festivals (Diwali, Holi, Eid, Christmas) are observed as campus holidays.
You can view and download the complete semester holiday list from the 'Notices' section on the college website.

patterns: What undergraduate courses are offered here?
Which engineering branches are available?
Do you have B.Tech in Artificial Intelligence and Data Science?
Syllabus and curriculum for Computer Science
What specialization options are available in B.Tech?
Is M.Tech or PhD programs available?
Tell me about the CSE and ECE departments
Can I change my branch after first year?
List of departments in the college
responses: We offer 4-year B.Tech programs in: Computer Science & Engineering (CSE), Artificial Intelligence & Data Science (AI & DS), Electronics & Communication (ECE), Electrical Engineering (EE), Mechanical Engineering (ME), and Civil Engineering (CE).
Postgraduate options include M.Tech in Data Science, VLSI Design, and Thermal Engineering, along with doctoral (Ph.D.) research programs across all engineering disciplines.
Branch change after the 1st year is permitted based on merit, provided the student scores a CGPA of 8.5+ with no backlogs and subject to seat availability.

patterns: What facilities are available on campus?
Is there a sports complex or gymnasium?
Tell me about the cafeteria and food courts
Is campus Wi-Fi free for students?
Are there medical and first aid facilities on campus?
Where is the innovation and robotics lab located?
Do you have banking and ATM facilities inside campus?
Tell me about student clubs and auditoriums
Parking facility for student vehicles
responses: Our 100-acre green campus features high-speed 5G Wi-Fi across all buildings, a modern Central Library, four air-conditioned food courts, and a 10,000 sq. ft. Innovation & Incubation Center.
Sports facilities include an Olympic-size swimming pool, cricket and football grounds, synthetic tennis/basketball courts, and an indoor sports complex with a state-of-the-art gym.
We also provide 24/7 on-campus medical assistance with a resident doctor and ambulance service, plus two on-campus bank branches and three ATMs for student convenience.

responses: I'm sorry, I am specifically trained to answer student support and campus-related questions (like timings, exams, fees, admissions, library, hostels, and placements). Could you please rephrase or ask about one of those topics?

I'm not quite sure about that! As your college support virtual assistant, I specialize in academic schedules, fees, scholarships, campus facilities, and placement details. How can I help you with those?
That query seems outside my campus knowledge base. Please feel free to ask me about admission procedures, exam date sheets, faculty contacts, or hostel regulations!
